name: Krautsuppe (Cabbage Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the bacon and cook until crispy.
2. Sauté onions in a large pot over medium heat until translucent.
3. Add turnip and carrots to the pot and continue sautéing.
4. Cube potatoes and add them to the pot with the vegetables.
5. Shred cabbage into the mixture.
6. Pour chicken stock or bouillon into the pot, followed by water.
7. Add parsley sprigs and bay leaf to the soup.
8. Bring the soup to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
9. Simmer for about 30 minutes until all vegetables are tender.
10. Adjust seasoning if needed and serve hot.
